summary: Well-engineered PowerShell solution. Workflow correctly uses `shell: pwsh` (not bash invocation), pins `actions/checkout@v4`, minimal `permissions: read`, sensible triggers (push/PR/dispatch/schedule). Scripts follow strict PowerShell conventions throughout: `$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'`, `Set-StrictMode`, proper try/catch with meaningful errors, quoted variables. Module design excellent (factories, normalized shapes, clear exports). Test harness validates actionlint + runs 2 act cases within 3-run budget. Minor concerns: hardcoded markdown generation in New-SummaryMarkdown (~350-395) and ASSERT_* token format tightly couple harness to script output; fixture schema undocumented. Exit codes sensible (0/1/2/3). Would ship.
